allowlisted_residual_roots.reason: source packs are upstream data inputs and are excluded from default dist output unless explicitly selected
legacy test pocket is retained as archival reference and is not wired into active top-level build entrypoints

policy_rows.rationale: legacy/source is archival material; the remaining live pocket is tests-only and does not own canonical runtime code.

taxonomy.FORBIDDEN_CODE_SRC: Generic code source directories that violate canonical domain placement and must not remain.
taxonomy.MOVE_TO_DOMAIN: Residual source pocket whose active implementation belongs under a canonical domain root.
taxonomy.QUARANTINE_REQUIRED: Ambiguous residual source pocket that cannot be justified safely in this pass.
taxonomy.VALID_CONTENT_SOURCE: Content or provenance source trees kept as upstream raw inputs rather than runtime code.
taxonomy.VALID_LEGACY_ARCHIVE_SOURCE: Legacy source trees retained as archival reference and fenced from active build/runtime ownership.
taxonomy.VALID_PACKAGING_SOURCE: Packaging or IDE-convention source trees that are semantically correct for toolchain ownership.
taxonomy.VALID_THIRDPARTY_SOURCE: Vendored or external source trees retained for third-party reasons.
